name: AI Tech Newsletter via Gmail
description: Uses Exa to search for trending tech stories across multiple topics, Claude AI curates and writes a polished newsletter with summaries and analysis, then sends the formatted HTML newsletter via Gmail.

source.originalName: Personalized AI tech newsletter using RSS, OpenAI and Gmail

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching tech news

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the newsletter

recipientEmail.description: Email address to send the newsletter to

senderName.description: Name shown as the newsletter sender

topics.default: AI, cloud computing, cybersecurity, startups, developer tools

steps.name: Build search queries for tech topics
Search Exa for all tech topics
Compile all search results by topic
Build Claude prompt for newsletter writing
Run Claude AI to write newsletter
